title: Description
description:
Contains all the visual definition properties for this entity, including identifier, textures, geometry, materials, animations, and spawn egg settings.

Properties:
• identifier (string)
• min_engine_version
• materials (object)
• textures (object)
• geometry (object)
• queryable_geometry (string)
• spawn_egg ({ texture, base_color, overlay_color, ... })
• scripts ({ variables, initialize, pre_animation, ... })
• ... and 8 more properties

identifier.title: Identifier
identifier.description: The namespaced identifier for this entity (e.g., 'minecraft:pig' or 'mypack:custom_mob'). Must match the behavior pack entity identifier.

min_engine_version.title: Min Engine Version
min_engine_version.description: The minimum Minecraft engine version required to render this entity. Used for forward compatibility.

materials.title: Materials
materials.description: Maps short names to material definitions that control how the entity is rendered. Common materials include 'entity', 'entity_alphatest', and 'entity_emissive'.

textures.title: Textures
textures.description: Maps short names to texture file paths. Paths are relative to the resource pack root (e.g., 'textures/entity/pig/pig'). The short name is used in render controllers.

geometry.title: Geometry
geometry.description: Maps short names to geometry model identifiers. Geometry defines the 3D shape and bone structure of the entity. Models are defined in .geo.json files.

queryable_geometry.title: Queryable Geometry
queryable_geometry.description: Specifies which geometry is queryable via Molang expressions. Used for ray casting and spatial queries in scripts.

spawn_egg.title: Spawn Egg
spawn_egg.description:
Defines the appearance of the spawn egg for this entity in the creative inventory.

Properties:
• texture (string)
• base_color (string)
• overlay_color (string)
• texture_index (int)

defaultSnippets.label: Spawn Egg
defaultSnippets.description: Defines the appearance of the spawn egg for this entity in the creative inventory.

scripts.title: Scripts
scripts.description:
Properties:
• variables ({ variable.[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]* })
• initialize
• pre_animation
• scale
• scale[xX]
• scale[yY]
• scale[zZ]
• parent_setup
• ... and 3 more properties

defaultSnippets.label: Description
